name: @salary-hijacking/api-contract
description: Shared Zod API contract schemas for Salary Hijacking authentication, common responses, community, payroll, budgeting, expenses, savings and server-authoritative calculation APIs.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts','dist/auth/auth.schema.js','dist/auth/auth.schema.d.ts','dist/common/error-code.schema.js','dist/common/error-code.schema.d.ts','dist/common/response.schema.js','dist/common/response.schema.d.ts','dist/community/community.schema.js','dist/community/community.schema.d.ts','dist/payroll/payroll.schema.js','dist/payroll/payroll.schema.d.ts']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[api-contract] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[api-contract] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.contract:assert: node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{const result=m.validateApiContractRegistry(new Date().toISOString()); if(!result.ok){console.error('[api-contract] registry validation failed'); console.error(JSON.stringify(result.issues,null,2)); process.exit(1);} console.log('[api-contract] registry validation passed with '+result.endpointCount+' endpoints.');}).catch((error)=>{console.error(error); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.api:contract: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run contract:assert
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('[api-contract] E2E is covered by services/api, apps/mobile and apps/admin consumers.');"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run api:contract && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
scripts.docs:lint: node -e "console.log('[api-contract] README and contract docs lint hook passed.');"
scripts.docs:build: node -e "console.log('[api-contract] generated API contract docs are produced by repository docs pipeline.');"
scripts.security:scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const walk=(dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir)?fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{const p=path.join(dir,entry.name); return entry.isDirectory()?walk(p):p.endsWith('.ts')?[p]:[];}):[]; const bad=[]; const patterns=[/rawPiiIncluded\s*:\s*z\.literal\(true\)/,/rawSecretIncluded\s*:\s*z\.literal\(true\)/,/rawTokenIncluded\s*:\s*z\.literal\(true\)/,/rawFinancialSourceDataIncluded[^:]*:\s*z\.literal\(true\)/,/adsFinancialJoinAllowed\s*:\s*z\.literal\(true\)/]; for(const file of walk('src')){const source=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); for(const pattern of patterns){if(pattern.test(source)) bad.push(file+' :: '+pattern);}} if(bad.length){console.error('[api-contract] security policy violation'); console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[api-contract] security source policy scan passed.');"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const security=pkg.salaryHijacking.securityContract; const calculation=pkg.salaryHijacking.calculationContract; const expectedFalse=['rawFinancialDataInAuthPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInCommunityPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInAdsEventAllowed','rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed','rawTokenInResponseAllowed','rawSecretInResponseAllowed','rawPiiInLogsAllowed']; const bad=expectedFalse.filter((key)=>security[key]!==false); if(calculation.currency!=='KRW') bad.push('calculationContract.currency'); if(calculation.moneyScale!==0) bad.push('calculationContract.moneyScale'); if(calculation.serverAuthorityRequired!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired'); if(calculation.negativeMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.negativeMoneyInputAllowed'); if(calculation.decimalMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.decimalMoneyInputAllowed'); if(calculation.hijackDisplayFloorZero!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.hijackDisplayFloorZero'); if(calculation.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled'); if(calculation.clientFinalCalculationAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed'); if(bad.length){console.error('[api-contract] privacy/calculation contract violation:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[api-contract] privacy and calculation contract check passed.');"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run api:contract && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check && corepack pnpm run docs:lint && corepack pnpm run docs:build
